    Industries served

    Tailored E-beam programs for regulated and industrial sectors across India - from medical manufacturing to wire & cable and gemstone export.

    Chemical-free

    Medical Devices

    Reliable sterilization for single-use disposables, implants, and diagnostic products.

    Wire & cable

    Polymers & Plastics

    Cross-linking for wires, cables, pipes, heat-shrink products, and engineered components.

    Gemstones

    Permanent colour enhancement for Topaz, Diamonds, and Quartz - lab-accepted worldwide.
